data.text: MADE SEVERAL EQUATORIAL LANDINGS. THIS PLANET SEEMS TO BE LARGELY
COVERED WITH THOSE BLUE WASTELANDS, WITH VEGETATION FOUND ONLY IN
LOWLAND REGIONS. BUT ITS VEGETATION, WHERE THEY EXIST, IS VERY GENEROUS
. CHECK OUT 3,69 FOR A FOREST. ALSO RECOMMENDED IS 290,63, WITH ONE OF
THOSE GULLIES COMMON TO THIS WORLD. AN ABSOLUTE MUST-SEE CAN BE FOUND AT
0,37. IT'S AN ISLAND WITH FEATURES SIMILAR TO THAT OF ONE I FOUND BACK
AT PELENOR GLACIER, BUT AT A MUCH GRANDER SCALE. A CLOSE-UP EXPLORATION
OFF TO HIGHER LATITUDES...JUST ABOUT THE 'REGULAR' ICY HILLS AND SUCH.
NOTE THE SURPRISING LACK OF FAUNA ON THIS WORLD. RYAN GJK E6011.782.241
